Name: Stripe Invoice Payment to HubSpot and Slack Alert
Description: Automates workflow for Stripe invoice payments: triggers on payment success, searches and updates HubSpot deals by PO number, and sends detailed Slack notifications to accounting team. Uses Stripe API, HubSpot API (OAuth2), and Slack for seamless payment tracking.

Name: AI-Powered HubSpot Chat Assistant
Description: An n8n workflow integrating HubSpot Conversations with OpenAI Assistants and Airtable. Automates receiving chat messages, processing via OpenAI APIs, invoking external business data APIs, and replying in HubSpot, enabling intelligent chat automation and CRM interaction.

Name: Sync Stripe Charges to HubSpot Contacts
Description: Automates syncing of Stripe charge data with HubSpot contacts using Stripe API to fetch charges and customers, then updating/creating HubSpot contact fields with total spend via HubSpot API. Includes scheduling, deduplication, and field management.

Name: Client Feedback Routing & HubSpot Logging
Description: Automates client conversation processing with OpenAI summarization, routes feedback to departments via email, and logs meeting notes in HubSpot using OAuth2. Uses n8n, Langchain, Gmail API, and HubSpot API to streamline client issue management.

Name: Automated Email Parsing & HubSpot CRM Update
Description: Workflow automates email parsing using OpenAI GPT-4o-mini model, extracts contact info, searches/updates contacts in HubSpot CRM, and creates email engagement records. Integrates IMAP email, HubSpot OAuth2 API, and LangChain AI nodes for seamless CRM enrichment.

Name: Automated HubSpot Onboarding & Calendar Scheduler
Description: An n8n workflow automating new customer onboarding using HubSpot CRM, OpenAI GPT-4 for personalized welcome emails, and Google Calendar for scheduling calls. Integrates HubSpot API, Gmail, and Langchain for AI-powered calendar management and email generation.

Name: HubSpot Contacts Pagination Fetcher
Description: n8n workflow to fetch HubSpot CRM contacts with automatic pagination handling using HubSpot API. It manages API keys, handles rate limiting by waiting between requests, and combines all paged results into a single dataset for further processing.

Name: Typeform to HubSpot Lead Automation
Description: Automates lead capture from Typeform surveys into HubSpot CRM, updating contact info and lifecycle stage, then sending a personalized Gmail follow-up. Uses Typeform API, HubSpot API, and Gmail OAuth2 for streamlined lead management and nurturing.

Name: HubSpot Deal Automation & Notification
Description: Automates HubSpot deal processing using HubSpot API triggers, categorizes deals by stage, creates tickets with priority in HubSpot, logs lost deals in Airtable, sends Slack notifications on deal closure, and generates Google Slides presentations for scheduled demos.

Name: HubSpot Contact Enrichment with Clearbit
Description: Automates enriching HubSpot contacts using Clearbit API. When a HubSpot contact event triggers, it fetches contact details, retrieves extra data from Clearbit (job title, company, city), and updates the HubSpot contact. Uses HubSpot OAuth2 & Clearbit APIs.

Name: CRM Contacts Sync Pipedrive & HubSpot
Description: Automates syncing and updating contacts between Pipedrive CRM and HubSpot using n8n automation platform. Utilizes Pipedrive and HubSpot APIs to fetch, compare, and update person/contact records based on email and name data on a scheduled basis.

Name: Sync Contacts from Pipedrive to HubSpot
Description: Automates syncing of contact records from Pipedrive CRM to HubSpot CRM using n8n workflow. Utilizes Pipedrive and HubSpot APIs to fetch all contacts, merge them by email to avoid duplicates, and update HubSpot contacts every minute via a cron trigger.

Name: Daily HubSpot to Mailchimp Contact Sync
Description: Automates daily syncing of new HubSpot contacts (created in the last day) to a Mailchimp mailing list using OAuth2 authentication for both APIs, triggered every day at 07:00 via n8n's cron node.

Name: Sync Mailchimp Contacts to HubSpot Daily
Description: Automates daily synchronization of updated Mailchimp members to HubSpot contacts using Mailchimp and HubSpot APIs. Tracks last execution timestamp to fetch only recent changes. Built with n8n workflow automation tool and cron scheduling.

Name: Sync HubSpot Companies with Zendesk Organizations
Description: Automates syncing of recently modified HubSpot companies to Zendesk organizations every 5 mins using HubSpot and Zendesk APIs. Checks if organization exists to update or create. Uses n8n with HubSpot App Token and Zendesk API credentials.

Name: Zendesk-HubSpot Ticket Sync Automation
Description: Automates synchronization of support tickets and contacts between Zendesk and HubSpot using their APIs. Periodically updates or creates tickets in HubSpot from Zendesk tickets, manages contact data, and keeps external IDs in sync timestamps to enable seamless cross-platform support management.

Name: HubSpot Contact Enrichment with ExactBuyer
Description: Automates enriching new HubSpot contacts using ExactBuyer API with OAuth2 authentication. On contact creation, it fetches the contact, uses email to get additional data from ExactBuyer, then updates HubSpot contact with enriched info like social profiles, job, and location.

Name: HubSpot Contact Outreach Automation
Description: Automates daily outreach emails to uncontacted HubSpot leads using Gmail and records engagement in HubSpot. Utilizes HubSpot API with OAuth2 for contact retrieval and engagement logging, plus Gmail API for sending personalized cold emails.

Name: HubSpot Contact Follow-Up Automation
Description: Automates follow-up outreach emails for HubSpot contacts using Gmail and HubSpot APIs via OAuth2. Runs daily at 9 am, filters contacts last contacted over 30 days ago with only one prior engagement, sends personalized emails, and records engagement in HubSpot CRM.

Name: HubSpot Lead Alerts to Slack
Description: Automates lead monitoring by fetching new companies created in HubSpot within the last 5 minutes, filters those with annual revenue over $5M, and sends detailed Slack notifications to sales reps. Uses HubSpot API, Slack API, and n8n scheduling for real-time lead alerts.

Name: Shopify to HubSpot Order Deal Sync
Description: Automates syncing of Shopify order updates with HubSpot CRM by creating/updating contacts and deals using Shopify API, HubSpot API and OAuth2. Ensures orders in Shopify reflect as deals in HubSpot, streamlining ecommerce sales workflows.

Name: HubSpot Deal Line Items Copier
Description: Automates copying line items from a won HubSpot deal to a newly created deal using HubSpot API and n8n. It fetches deals, retrieves line items and SKUs, gets product info by SKUs, creates line items for the new deal, and sends Slack notifications.

Name: HubSpot Email Validation & Alert Workflow
Description: Automates validation of new HubSpot contact emails using HubSpot APIs and OneSimple API; sends Slack alerts for suspicious emails. Ensures contact email quality by checking deliverability, domain validity, and disposability, improving CRM data integrity.

Name: Lemlist & HubSpot Email Reply Automation
Description: Automates lead reply categorization and follow-up creation using Lemlist API, HubSpot CRM, and OpenAI GPT-3 for reply analysis. It unsubscribes, tags replies as interested or out-of-office, and creates deals/tasks in HubSpot, enhancing sales workflows.

Name: Smartlead Campaign & HubSpot Data Sync
Description: Automates fetching and synchronizing campaign and lead data from Smartlead API with HubSpot CRM, storing enriched data in Postgres, and reporting via Google Sheets. Integrates Smartlead API, HubSpot API, PostgreSQL, and Google Sheets to provide up-to-date campaign analytics and lifecycle stage tracking.

Name: HubSpot Chatbot AI Assistant Integration
Description: An n8n workflow integrating HubSpot Conversations with OpenAI Assistants to automate chatbot interactions. It handles message retrieval, OpenAI thread management, action execution, and response posting using HubSpot API, OpenAI API (assistants v1), Airtable for thread mapping, and external company data APIs (listafirme.ro).

Name: HubSpot & Lemlist Hiring Lead Automation
Description: Automates hiring lead management by integrating Lonescale job intent webhook with Dropcontact enrichment, HubSpot CRM for company/contact handling, Lemlist campaigns, and Slack notifications. Tech stack: HubSpot API, Lemlist API, Dropcontact API, Slack API.

Name: Automated HubSpot Deal Assignment
Description: This n8n workflow automates the assignment of unassigned HubSpot deals to sales reps based on deal region (US, Germany, others) and company size using HubSpot CRM API. Runs on scheduled trigger every 2 days. Includes data fetching, filtering, and updating HubSpot deals via OAuth2.

Name: CRM Auto-Update from Calendly with Clearbit & HubSpot
Description: Automates CRM updates by triggering on Calendly bookings. Uses Clearbit API to enrich contact and company data, filters personal emails, then upserts leads and companies in HubSpot CRM via OAuth2. Streamlines lead management and data accuracy.

Name: HubSpot CRM Data Import via CSV
Description: Automates importing CSV data into HubSpot CRM objects (companies, contacts, deals, leads, tickets) with field mapping and validation. Uses HubSpot API, Google Sheets for property management, and n8n for workflow orchestration.

Name: HubSpot Client LinkedIn & Post Monitor
Description: Automates tracking of HubSpot owners' clients by fetching client data via HubSpot API, searching LinkedIn profiles through RapidAPI, monitoring LinkedIn posts and positions, and updating a Google Sheet. Sends email alerts using Gmail when client updates occur.

Name: HubSpot New Company Domain Validator & Alert
Description: Automates monitoring of new HubSpot companies by validating their website domains via HTTP request. Suspicious or unreachable domains trigger alerts posted to Slack. Integrates HubSpot API for company data and Slack API for real-time notifications.

Name: HubSpot Contact Change Trigger
Description: Triggers workflows based on HubSpot CRM contact changes using HubSpot Developer API in n8n. Ideal for automations reacting to contact updates or creations via webhook integration.

Name: Hubspot Contacts Export Trigger
Description: An n8n workflow that triggers manually to fetch all contacts from Hubspot CRM using the Hubspot API. Ideal for syncing or exporting contact data for further processing or analysis.
